name: wkea-brand-management-expert
description: WKEA brand management expert: CRUD, bind/unbind vendors and categories, manage brand links and trademark info.

displayDescription.en: WKEA brand lifecycle: create/edit/delete, bind/unbind vendors and categories, manage brand links and trademark info, with full cascade impact awareness.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA 品牌全生命周期管理：增删改查、与供应商和分类的绑定/解绑、品牌链接和商标信息维护，全程关注级联影响。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要管理哪个品牌（提供品牌名或业务诉求）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert which brand to manage (brand name or business need)

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要管理哪个品牌（提供品牌名或业务诉求）
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert which brand to manage (brand name or business need)

quickPrompts.zh: 查一下「西门子」品牌是否存在
把品牌 B001234 绑定到供应商 S00860
quickPrompts.en: Bind brand B001234 to vendor S00860
